title: National Cemetery of Canada Act
description: National Cemetery of Canada Act (National Cemetery of Canada Act). Current to 2026-02-04.

provisions.title: Short title
provisions.content: 1 This Act may be cited as the National Cemetery of Canada Act .

provisions.title: National cemetery
provisions.content: 2 Beechwood Cemetery is given honorary recognition as the national cemetery of Canada.

provisions.title: Description
provisions.content: 3 For the purpose of section 2, Beechwood Cemetery is, under the registry system of Ontario, the area composed of Part of Lot 3, Concession Junction Gore, Part of Lot 2, Concession Junction Gore, Part of Block 23, Plan 92, Part of Blocks 15A and Btn Rds, Plan 92, Ottawa and Vanier.
